# RFC 9700 endpoint inventory (generated)
#
# Generated by scripts/rfc9700-scan.sh from the oidc_router in
# crates/ironauth-oidc/src/lib.rs; do not edit by hand. Every path here MUST be
# mapped to a covering test (or an explicit not-applicable reason) in
# docs/conformance/rfc9700-checklist.md, so a new OAuth endpoint cannot ship
# uncovered while the checklist reads complete.
/authorize
/consent
/device_authorization
/introspect
/login
/par
/register
/revoke
/t/{tenant_id}/e/{environment_id}/connect/register
/t/{tenant_id}/e/{environment_id}/connect/register/{client_id}
/t/{tenant_id}/e/{environment_id}/device
/token
/userinfo
